conditions.subject: OPERATOR
conditions._note: Triggers on Wolven Ambrage activation — battle skill hitting a Vulnerable target. Modeled as battle skill trigger; the Vulnerable condition is implicit in the Wolven Ambrage mechanic.

properties.name: Nicks and Scratches (Talent)
properties.description: After Wolven Ambrage activates, applies Razor Clawmark to target. While active: target takes Physical DMG per second and increased Physical + Heat DMG taken.
